context: Tests whether the agent follows the requirement-gathering skill when preparing for a stakeholder interview: reviewing existing specs to identify what's already covered, identifying genuine gaps, formulating one-at-a-time questions based on those gaps, and producing a structured requirements summary.

checklist.name: Output file created
checklist.description: A file named requirements-prep.md is produced

checklist.name: Existing coverage section
checklist.description: requirements-prep.md contains a section summarizing what the existing specs (user-management.spec.md, auth.spec.md) already document that is relevant to the export feature

checklist.name: Cites list_users as existing
checklist.description: The coverage summary specifically notes that list_users with role/status filtering already exists in the spec

checklist.name: Gap analysis present
checklist.description: requirements-prep.md contains a section identifying specific ambiguous or undocumented areas for the export feature (not just generic categories)

checklist.name: Questions are separate items
checklist.description: Interview questions are listed as individual numbered items — NOT bundled together as a multi-part question or a comma-separated list

checklist.name: No redundant questions
checklist.description: Questions do NOT ask about things already documented in the existing specs (e.g. does NOT ask what roles exist, does NOT ask about pagination behavior already defined)

checklist.name: Performance/scale addressed
checklist.description: Gap analysis or questions address the large-org scale requirement (50k+ users) — e.g. async job vs. synchronous, streaming, timeouts

checklist.name: Preliminary scope section
checklist.description: requirements-prep.md contains a scope section distinguishing what is likely in scope versus out of scope

checklist.name: Non-functional gaps identified
checklist.description: Gap analysis or questions address at least one non-functional requirement (performance, security, file size limits, rate limiting, or similar)

checklist.name: Gap-driven questions
checklist.description: Each question clearly addresses a gap identified in the gap analysis — not generic process questions or things answerable from existing specs

checklist.name: Questions are specific and bounded
checklist.description: Questions are specific and bounded (e.g. 'Should the export be synchronous or generated as a background job?' not 'How should the export work?')
